infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Scan syllabus pages so Study Planner can help create your course plan.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Choose syllabus screenshots or photos to import into your plan.
infoPlist.NSCalendarsFullAccessUsageDescription: Sync assignment and exam dates to your calendar.
infoPlist.NSUserNotificationsUsageDescription: Send calm reminders before deadlines, exams, and classes.
